Our services

How IGLORA can help

Working at the intersection of research, strategy and field operations, we deliver consulting that turns evidence into impact across sectors.

📊

Research & Data

Large-scale field surveys, facility mapping, and data-driven research.

📈

Monitoring & Evaluation

M&E frameworks, impact assessments, and performance tracking.

🎯

Capacity Building

Training, workshops, and institutional strengthening.

🏥

Health Systems

Facility assessments and health service delivery optimization.

🌾

Agricultural Development

Sustainable agriculture, value chain analysis, and AgriTech advisory.

👥

Youth & Community

Safe Spaces, youth empowerment, and community programs.

About IGLORA

Where development gets creative

IGLORA Consulting is an Egyptian development consulting firm headquartered in 10th of Ramadan City, specializing in high-impact consulting across research, M&E, capacity building, and field operations.

We partner with international organizations and government entities to drive measurable change across Egypt, Saudi Arabia and the UAE.
